name: 23"x25"x5" Sunbrella Stripe Outdoor Throw Pillow and Cushion Set Blue/White: UV & Weather-Resistant Patio Furniture
description: Add an extra element of comfort to your outdoor gathering space with a Corded Outdoor Deep Seat Pillow and Cushion Set from Sunbrella. Featuring durable weather- and fade-resistant fabric that stands up to the elements and keeps your cushions looking great, this six-piece set includes three generously stuffed seat cushions and three coordinating pillows for added comfort on the backrest. Corded seams give the pieces a polished finish. Choose from a variety of colors and patterns to create an appealing outdoor look that suits your fancy. Sunbrella is a 100% acrylic fabric that is water resistant, spill resistant, and fade resistant. Ideal for outdoor use, Sunbrella fabric is UV treated for high-quality fade resistance.
